name: unimeet-desktop
description: UniMeet — desktop video conferencing for Windows, Mac, and Linux
author: UniMeet

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5123/api/health http://localhost:5173 && cross-env UNIMEET_PORT=5123 electron .
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,electron -c blue,green,magenta "cross-env PORT=5123 DESKTOP_MODE=true CLIENT_URL=http://localhost:5173 npm run dev --prefix backend" "cross-env UNIMEET_API_TARGET=http://localhost:5123 npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run prepare:desktop && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --publish never && node scripts/copy-installer.js
scripts.build:desktop:portable: npm run prepare:desktop && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win dir --publish never
